label: Stage end trigger (role arrived and spectators on substructure)
description: Ends the stage when the designated role has arrived and all spectators are standing on the ritual substructure.

roleIds.label: Role IDs
roleIds.description: List of role IDs that must have arrived for this trigger to fire.

clearTag.label: Clear tag
clearTag.description: If true, removes the arrival tag from role pawns when the trigger fires.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Pawn tag that must be set on role pawns for the arrival check to pass.
